SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
CompressorAntiSurgeApplication
public static class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding extends Object implements Serializable
Real NeqSim topology binding for one compressor anti-surge stage.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TopologyBinding

      public TopologyBinding(ProcessSystem process, Compressor compressor, ThrottlingValve hotRecycleValve, ThrottlingValve coldRecycleValve)
      Create a topology binding.
      Parameters:
      process - process system containing the topology; may be null
      compressor - compressor controlled by the application
      hotRecycleValve - fast hot recycle valve; may be null
      coldRecycleValve - normal cold recycle valve; may be null

  • Method Details

    • applyDecision

      private void applyDecision(CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageDecision decision, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput input, double dt)
      Apply a stage decision to the bound real topology.
      Parameters:
      decision - stage decision
      input - scan input used for the decision
      dt - scan period in seconds

    • applySpeedControl

      private void applySpeedControl(CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageDecision decision, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput input, double dt)
      Apply a simple pressure-speed controller with anti-surge runback override.
      Parameters:
      decision - stage decision
      input - scan input
      dt - scan period in seconds

    • enableSpeedControl

      public void enableSpeedControl(double dischargePressureSetPoint, double speedGain, double minimumSpeed, double maximumSpeed, double recycleRunbackRate)
      Enable simple discharge-pressure speed control.
      Parameters:
      dischargePressureSetPoint - discharge pressure set point in bara
      speedGain - speed gain in rpm per bar per second
      minimumSpeed - minimum speed in rpm
      maximumSpeed - maximum speed in rpm
      recycleRunbackRate - speed runback during recycle action in rpm per second

    • disableSpeedControl

      public void disableSpeedControl()
      Disable speed-control writeback.

      Get process system.
      Returns:
      process system, or null
